use_cases: Display user profile pictures with fallback initials in dashboard layouts
Show online/offline/busy/away status indicators for team member lists
User identification and presence in messaging and collaboration interfaces
Profile display in settings and account management pages
Avatar display in card components for user information sections
ai_summary: A composite avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives with modular sub-components (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, AvatarStatus). Supports four status variants (online/offline/busy/away) with configurable styling via class-variance-authority. Includes responsive flexbox layout, rounded-full styling, and border/shadow theming. Ideal for user profile display in SaaS dashboards, messaging interfaces, and team collaboration tools where user presence and identification are needed.
